commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the agent read wrapper to retry missing bare date filenames as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` with workspace guard validation and adds workspace-path regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +76. Total +131 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was established here. Source inspection shows a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` read resolves at the workspace root and can ENOENT when the file exists under `memory/`, matching the linked issue trajectory.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is contributor-supplied runtime proof plus maintainer judgment on the read-wrapper fallback boundary, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): normalize bare date filenames to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md in…
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #92372.

Multi-agent secondary agents with explicit workspaces fail to read daily memory files when the model drops the `memory/` prefix. The startup context prelude loads daily memory as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`, guidance tells the model it's "already included," and the model forms a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` path — hitting ENOENT at the workspace root.

Additionally, the ENOENT retry branch synthesized `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` and called `params.base.execute` directly, completely bypassing the outer `wrapToolWorkspaceRootGuardWithOptions` sandbox validation. A symlinked `memory/` directory pointing outside the workspace would escape the sandbox (P1 security boundary).

## Why This Change Was Made

- Relax `DAILY_MEMORY_PATH_RE` to also match bare date filenames, then prepend `memory/` in `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath`.
- Flatten `executeReadPage` into a two-phase flow: Phase 1 tries the original path; Phase 2 retries with the canonical `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` path only on ENOENT.
- Validate the synthesized retry path through `assertSandboxPath` (the same async guard used by the outer wrapper, including real-path symlink/hardlink/alias resolution via `assertNoPathAliasEscape`) before any filesystem access.
- Pass the workspace root via an optional `workspaceRoot` string — no callback indirection. Only injected when `workspaceOnly` is true.
- Preserve existing behavior: root-level date files succeed on first attempt, `memory/`-prefixed paths are unchanged, non-date filenames are unaffected, and `missingDailyMemoryReadResult` soft-fail is preserved.

## User Impact

Secondary agents with explicit workspaces can now successfully read daily memory files even when the model sends a bare date filename. No stale ENOENT errors, no wasted tokens. All synthesized fallback paths remain strictly confined inside the workspace sandbox — a symlinked `memory/` directory cannot escape.

## Evidence

Base: `origin/main` at `081f8fd1fa`. One squashed commit on `fix/read-tool-bare-date-filename-memory-prefix`.

### 端到端验证（源码直跑，4/4 通过）

```
$ node --import tsx scripts/verify-read-memory-redirect.mjs

═══ 场景 1：裸日期文件名自动重定向到 memory/ 子目录 ═══
  [setup] workspace/memory/2026-06-12.md ✓ (文件存在)
  [setup] workspace/2026-06-12.md ✗ (文件不存在)
  [调用] read(path="2026-06-12.md")  ← 模型丢了 memory/ 前缀
  ✓ PASS  Phase 1 ENOENT → Phase 2 重定向成功，读到 memory/2026-06-12.md
  [返回] 今日记忆: 用户偏好使用 TypeScript

═══ 场景 2：memory/ 是外部软链接 → assertSandboxPath 拦截 ═══
  [setup] workspace/memory → symlink → /tmp/.../outside (工作区外部)
  [调用] read(path="2026-06-12.md")
  ✓ PASS  assertSandboxPath 拦截成功: Symlink escapes sandbox root (...)

═══ 场景 3：根目录同名文件优先（不触发重定向） ═══
  [setup] workspace/2026-06-12.md ✓ + workspace/memory/2026-06-12.md ✓ (两个都存在)
  [调用] read(path="2026-06-12.md")
  ✓ PASS  Phase 1 直接在根目录命中，未触发重定向
  [返回] 根目录日记

═══ 场景 4：memory/ 前缀路径不变（无重试循环） ═══
  [调用] read(path="memory/2026-06-12.md")
  ✓ PASS  首次调用直接成功 (requestedPath === params.args.path, 无重试)

══════════════════════════════════════
  结果: 4/4 通过
══════════════════════════════════════
```

### 运行时 trace：场景 1 — 裸日期 → memory/ 重定向

```
Phase 1:  base.execute("2026-06-12.md") → ENOENT (workspace 根目录不存在)
          normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath("2026-06-12.md") → "memory/2026-06-12.md"
          assertSandboxPath("memory/2026-06-12.md", workspaceRoot) → PASS
Phase 2:  base.execute("memory/2026-06-12.md") → "今日记忆: 用户偏好使用 TypeScript"
result:   ✓ 重定向成功，读取 memory/2026-06-12.md
```

### 运行时 trace：场景 2 — symlink 逃逸拦截

```
Phase 1:  base.execute("2026-06-12.md") → ENOENT
          normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath → "memory/2026-06-12.md"
          assertSandboxPath → resolveSandboxPath → assertNoPathAliasEscape
            → realpath(memory/2026-06-12.md) = /tmp/.../outside/2026-06-12.md
            → 不在 workspace root 内 → THROW "Symlink escapes sandbox root"
result:   ✗ BLOCKED — 无文件系统访问
```

### 全量测试套件

```
$ pnpm test src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.workspace-root-guard.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-edit-access.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.arg-value-suffix.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-tilde-expansion.test.ts

 Test Files  7 passed (7)
      Tests  124 passed (124)
```

```
$ pnpm tsgo
# passed clean
```

### 路径归一化

| Input | Output | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `memory/2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | unchanged |
| `2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | corrected |
| `./2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | corrected |
| `regular-file.md` | `undefined` | not triggered |

### 安全边界

| Scenario | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `memory/` is a regular directory in workspace | `assertSandboxPath` passes, retry proceeds |
| `memory/` is a symlink inside workspace | `assertSandboxPath` passes, retry proceeds |
| `memory/` is a symlink outside workspace | `assertSandboxPath` throws, no FS access |
| `workspaceOnly` is false | `workspaceRoot` is `undefined`, no validation |

## Root Cause

`DAILY_MEMORY_PATH_RE` at `agent-tools.read.ts:76` was `/^memory\/\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\.md$/` — it only recognized paths with the `memory/` prefix. When the model sent a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md`, `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath` returned `undefined`, the path was never corrected before the base tool executed, and the read resolved to `workspace-root/YYYY-MM-DD.md` (ENOENT) instead of `workspace-root/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.

Security gap: The ENOENT retry at `executeReadPage:299` called `params.base.execute` directly with the synthesized `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` path, completely bypassing the outer workspace path guard. No sandbox validation was applied to the fallback path.

## Reviewer Focus

- `agent-tools.read.ts:78` — relaxed regex
- `agent-tools.read.ts:257-271` — `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath` with `memory/` prepend
- `agent-tools.read.ts:283-345` — flattened `executeReadPage` with Phase 1/Phase 2 + `assertSandboxPath` guard
- `agent-tools.ts:772` — `workspaceRoot` injection gated on `workspaceOnly`
- `agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts` — 3 new regression tests
- `scripts/verify-read-memory-redirect.mjs` — 端到端验证脚本

Files changed: `src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts`, `src/agents/agent-tools.ts`, `src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts` (+139/-8 lines).
target.author: chenyangjun-xy
